basic_details.job_title: TISS Research Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Research Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Research Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Social Sciences, Management, Commerce, Science, or related disciplines with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade.
qualification.details: Master's degree in Social Sciences, Management, Commerce, Science, or related disciplines with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Research Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TISS Research Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Research Officer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Research Officer recruitment is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Social Sciences, Management, Commerce, Science, or related disciplines with a minimum of 55% marks or an equivalent grade.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the TISS Research Officer job?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure you attach all required documents and send the email before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by a personal interaction, which can be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Officer position advertised by TISS.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Research Officer position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the TISS located?
faq.answer: TISS is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Who can I contact if I have further questions?
faq.answer: For any further queries, it is advisable to refer to the official notification or contact the TISS recruitment cell directly through the channels provided in the official advertisement.
